description: Delete an unused function and keep the rest intact.
prompt: Remove the function `dead_code()` from utils.py. Don't touch any other function.
check: ! grep -q 'dead_code' utils.py && grep -q 'def live_code' utils.py && grep -q 'def other' utils.py && python3 -c "import utils; assert utils.live_code()=='used' and utils.other()=='also used'"
